en: A lot of people on TV didn't expect a war like this
ko: TV에 나오는 많은 사람들은 이런 전쟁이

en: to happen in, let's say, certain neighborhoods.
ko: 특정 지역에서 일어날 거라고 예상하지 못했어요.

en: This is not a developing third-world nation.
This is Europe.
These are prosperous, middle-class people.
These are not people trying to get away
from areas in North Africa.
They look like any European family
that you would live next door to.
What could be a difference here from other conflicts,
you know, that could seem very far away,
you know, in Africa or Middle East or whatever?
I mean, these are Europeans that we're seeing being killed.
This isn't a place, with all due respect,
you know, like Iraq or Afghanistan.
You know, this is a relatively civilized,
relatively European —
I have to choose those words carefully, too —
city where you wouldn't expect that
or hope that it's going to happen.
Wow.
That was you choosing your words carefully?
That was the careful version?
